tool.name: oauth_tester
tool.description: Automated OAuth flow testing for security vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Analyze complete OAuth authorization flow - Test redirect URI validation (open redirect) - Check state parameter security (CSRF) - Analyze PKCE implementation - Generate OAuth security test cases - Analyze OAuth token structure

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action to perform: - analyze_flow: Analyze complete OAuth authorization URL - check_redirect_uri: Test redirect URI validation - check_state: Analyze state parameter security - check_pkce: Analyze PKCE implementation - generate_tests: Generate OAuth security test cases - analyze_token: Analyze OAuth token structure

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: OAuth authorization URL to analyze. Required for analyze_flow.

parameter.name: redirect_uri
parameter.description: Redirect URI to test. Required for check_redirect_uri.

parameter.name: code_challenge_method
parameter.description: PKCE method: plain or S256 (for check_pkce)

parameter.name: token
parameter.description: OAuth token to analyze. Required for analyze_token.

returns.description: Security analysis results with findings and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Analyze OAuth flow
analyze_flow https://auth.example.com/authorize?client_id=xxx&redirect_uri=https://app.com/callback&response_type=code&state=abc123
# Check redirect URI
check_redirect_uri https://app.example.com/callback
# Check state parameter
check_state abc123xyz
# Check PKCE
check_pkce E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw S256
# Generate test cases
generate_tests
